A journey across England. A return to something deeper.

The Tracks Remember

A story told in two ways—through reflection and through wonder.

Explore the Story Explore with Saúl

The Tracks Remember

A reflective journey through memory, place, family, and meaning—told through landscapes, quiet observations, and the inner movement of travel.

Explore the Story

Trains and Castles

The same adventure, seen through a child’s eyes—full of trains, castles, questions, movement, and wonder.

Explore with Saúl

Two books. One journey.

These two books share the same path, but not the same voice. One remembers. The other lives it. Together, they offer two ways of seeing a journey across England—through reflection and through wonder.

The journey

From New York to London, York, Bamburgh, Lindisfarne, Edinburgh, and back again, the journey moves through places filled with history, emotion, and discovery.

What changes along the way is not only the landscape, but the way it is seen.

Continue the journey online

This site extends the experience beyond the printed page—with book details, companion content, and future additions that continue the story.

This is the beginning of the digital side of the journey.

About the author

Jorge R. Obando writes about memory, movement, family, and the quiet meaning carried inside ordinary moments.

The Tracks Remember and Trains and Castles were created as companion works—two ways of telling one shared journey.

About Jorge
